{"id":"propertyhack-cy5","title":"Image Prompt Engineering for Brand Consistency","description":"Design and test the image generation prompt template that produces consistent editorial illustrations matching PropertyHack branding. Requirements: 1) Flat/geometric illustration style, NOT photorealistic photos. 2) Consistent colour palette incorporating cream, charcoal, and gold accent tones. 3) Property/architecture themed visual elements appropriate to article category (residential=houses, commercial=buildings, finance=charts/coins, policy=government buildings, etc). 4) Clean composition suitable for 16:9 card thumbnails. 5) No text in images. 6) Test with multiple article types to verify consistency. Store the prompt template as a configurable string in the service.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"dan@microrocket.com","created_at":"2026-03-07T10:45:44Z","created_by":"prawn47","updated_at":"2026-03-07T10:45:44Z"}

{"id":"propertyhack-b6u","title":"Static Image Serving Endpoint","description":"Add Express route to serve generated article images. Route: GET /images/articles/:filename. Store images in server/public/images/articles/ directory. Ensure directory is created on startup. Add static file serving middleware in server/index.js. Image filenames should be article slug + .png. This is a simple v1 approach - can move to CDN/S3 later.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"dan@microrocket.com","created_at":"2026-03-07T10:45:44Z","created_by":"prawn47","updated_at":"2026-03-07T10:45:44Z"}

{"id":"propertyhack-b6u","title":"Static Image Serving Endpoint","description":"Add Express route to serve generated article images. Route: GET /images/articles/:filename. Store images in server/public/images/articles/ directory. Ensure directory is created on startup. Add static file serving middleware in server/index.js. Image filenames should be article slug + .png. This is a simple v1 approach - can move to CDN/S3 later.","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"dan@microrocket.com","created_at":"2026-03-07T10:45:44Z","created_by":"prawn47","updated_at":"2026-03-07T10:46:27Z"}

{"id":"propertyhack-cy5","title":"Image Prompt Engineering for Brand Consistency","description":"Design and test the image generation prompt template that produces consistent editorial illustrations matching PropertyHack branding. Requirements: 1) Flat/geometric illustration style, NOT photorealistic photos. 2) Consistent colour palette incorporating cream, charcoal, and gold accent tones. 3) Property/architecture themed visual elements appropriate to article category (residential=houses, commercial=buildings, finance=charts/coins, policy=government buildings, etc). 4) Clean composition suitable for 16:9 card thumbnails. 5) No text in images. 6) Test with multiple article types to verify consistency. Store the prompt template as a configurable string in the service.","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"dan@microrocket.com","created_at":"2026-03-07T10:45:44Z","created_by":"prawn47","updated_at":"2026-03-07T10:46:19Z"}

{"id":"propertyhack-ncp","title":"Image Generation Service (Google Imagen 3)","description":"Create server/services/imageGenerationService.js that uses Google's Imagen 3 API (via @google/generative-ai SDK, same as our Gemini setup) to generate article illustrations. The service should: 1) Accept article title, shortBlurb, and category as input. 2) Auto-generate an image prompt that produces consistent editorial illustration style - flat/geometric art, not photorealistic - using our brand palette (cream #f0f0f0, black #2b2b2b, gold #d4b038 accents). 3) Call Imagen 3 to generate a 1024x576 (16:9) image. 4) Upload the result to a storage location (start with saving base64 and serving from Express, can move to S3/Cloudinary later). 5) Return the image URL. Include error handling and fallback to placeholder.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"dan@microrocket.com","created_at":"2026-03-07T10:45:27Z","created_by":"prawn47","updated_at":"2026-03-07T10:45:27Z"}

{"id":"propertyhack-ncp","title":"Image Generation Service (Google Imagen 3)","description":"Create server/services/imageGenerationService.js that uses Google's Imagen 3 API (via @google/generative-ai SDK, same as our Gemini setup) to generate article illustrations. The service should: 1) Accept article title, shortBlurb, and category as input. 2) Auto-generate an image prompt that produces consistent editorial illustration style - flat/geometric art, not photorealistic - using our brand palette (cream #f0f0f0, black #2b2b2b, gold #d4b038 accents). 3) Call Imagen 3 to generate a 1024x576 (16:9) image. 4) Upload the result to a storage location (start with saving base64 and serving from Express, can move to S3/Cloudinary later). 5) Return the image URL. Include error handling and fallback to placeholder.","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"dan@microrocket.com","created_at":"2026-03-07T10:45:27Z","created_by":"prawn47","updated_at":"2026-03-07T10:47:40Z"}

{"id":"propertyhack-cz5","title":"Backfill Images for Existing Articles","description":"Create a one-time script server/scripts/backfill-images.js that: 1) Finds all PUBLISHED articles with null imageUrl. 2) Queues each to the article-image queue for processing. 3) Logs progress. {"id":"propertyhack-x5e","title":"BUG: /api/categories returns 500 - Prisma distinct+orderBy incompatibility","description":"GET /api/categories crashes with Prisma error: Argument not must not be null. The route at server/routes/public/categories.js uses findMany with distinct: ['category'] combined with a where clause that has 'not: null' which is invalid in Prisma 6. Fix: use raw SQL SELECT DISTINCT or fix the Prisma query syntax.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"dan@microrocket.com","created_at":"2026-03-07T11:21:07Z","created_by":"prawn47","updated_at":"2026-03-07T11:21:07Z"}
